overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a continuous walk along an elevated highway bridge sidewalk. The player moves past construction barriers, along a curved coastal overpass with ocean views, and descends under a multi-level highway interchange. The environment features typical Los Santos infrastructure with concrete overpasses, billboards, and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge sidewalk with construction barriers

events.description: black sedan and white car pass by on the highway to the left
passing the last construction barrier, path opens up

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated bridge sidewalk next to active highway traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the highway

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing button
wooden A-frame barriers with orange and white stripes blocking part of sidewalk
multi-level concrete highway ramps and support pillars
large wooden industrial cable reel with black cable

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated highway bridge sidewalk with construction barriers lining the right side. The camera moves forward past a traffic light pole as vehicles drive by on the multi-lane highway to the left. The environment is open and sunlit with clear visibility of the concrete infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved coastal bridge walkway with ocean view

events.description: ocean and beach become visible on the right side as the bridge curves

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved bridge path with the coastline visible on the right

entered.detail: blue ocean water and sandy beach visible in the distance beyond the bridge railing
tall palm trees lining the coastal area below the bridge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the construction barriers end, revealing a panoramic view of the ocean and beach on the right. The sidewalk curves gently along the elevated bridge with palm trees visible in the distance. The camera passes a large cable spool on the right while continuing alongside the highway traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass intersection with commercial billboards

events.description: large commercial billboards become prominent on the left side
approaching the shadow of the overpass, light becomes diffused

agents.ego_description: approaching the highway interchange with billboards visible ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi and white sedan driving on the highway

entered.detail: large billboard with 'Pharma on Shore' advertisement featuring a woman's face
red billboard with 'Red Vice' text visible in the distance
blue and red Interstate 5 highway shield sign

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a major highway interchange where large commercial billboards dominate the left side of the view. The path continues under the shadow of the concrete overpass structure, with highway signs indicating the freeway entrance becoming visible. Vehicles including a yellow taxi pass by on the left as the environment transitions from open coastal views to an urban highway corridor.

events.description: entering the covered underpass area beneath the highway overpass
descending to street level under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and descending toward street level where vehicles are parked

notable_agents.action: red sports car parked under the overpass

entered.detail: underside of the highway overpass creating a covered tunnel effect
bright red two-door sports car parked under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the shadowy underpass beneath the highway overpass, where the lighting shifts to artificial shade. The camera descends to street level, passing a red sports car parked under the concrete structure. Green freeway entrance signs are visible on the right as the environment becomes fully enclosed by the massive concrete pillars and ceiling of the interchange.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along an elevated highway bridge that transitions from an open, sunlit coastal vista into a shadowed urban interchange. It begins on a sidewalk lined with construction barriers, moving past a traffic light pole as vehicles flow along the multi-lane highway. As the barriers end, the scene opens up to reveal a panoramic view of the ocean and beach to the right, with the camera curving gently past a large cable spool and distant palm trees. The environment then shifts toward a dense highway corridor, passing large commercial billboards and a yellow taxi before moving under the looming shadow of a concrete overpass. Finally, the camera descends to street level into a fully enclosed underpass, where the lighting turns to artificial shade among massive concrete pillars and green freeway signs.
